title: sedum creticum subsp. cyrenaicum
intro: Sedum creticum subsp. cyrenaicum, also known as the Cretan Stonecrop, is a subspecies of succulent plant native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sedum creticum subsp. cyrenaicum include soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
